title: Keurig Dr Pepper to Report First Quarter 2022 Results and Host Conference Call
text: BURLINGTON, Mass. and FRISCO, Texas , March 30, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Keurig Dr Pepper Inc. (NASDAQ: KDP) will release its financial results for the first quarter ended March 31, 2022 before the market opens on Thursday, April 28, 2022.

title: Keurig Dr Pepper: Not Getting Enough Attention
text: Keurig Dr Pepper rarely makes the headlines, however, the company's strong business is growing fast.

title: Keurig Dr. Pepper downgraded as at-home coffee consumption expected to fall
text: Keurig Dr. Pepper Inc. KDP, -0.08% was downgraded to hold from buy at Truist, with analysts anticipating that at-home coffee consumption will drop as post-pandemic activities pick up. Truist maintained its $40 price target.

title: Beverage Stocks to Buy for Dividends, Defense and Inflation Protection
text: Any bet that could offer the trifecta of value, dividends and inflation protection would appear to be a slam dunk pick in today's particularly tricky market. Well, it just so happens that such names exist, and they hail from a somewhat surprising sector: beverage stocks.
